title: Monsoon Marinated Galangal Jjigae Bap
description: A spicy and crispy Korean dish made with marinated galangal, fermented kimchi, and crispy rice, perfect for a stormy day.
instructions: Marinate the galangal in a mixture of chili flakes, fish sauce, soy sauce, and sesame oil for at least 30 minutes.
Heat 1 tablespoon of vegetable oil in a large terracotta dish over medium-high heat.
Add the marinated galangal and cook for 2-3 minutes on each side, until slightly charred.
Add the fermented kimchi, garlic, and ginger to the dish and stir to combine.
Push the kimchi mixture to one side of the dish, and add the beaten egg to the other side.
Scramble the egg and then mix it with the kimchi mixture.
Add the cooked rice to the dish, breaking up any clumps with a spatula.
Mix everything together and cook for an additional 2-3 minutes, until the rice is crispy and golden brown.
Transfer the bap to a serving plate and top with chopped green onions.
